docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSAK, AARON
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSAK, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-25-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AARON HUSAK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY HUSAK, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSAK, AARON
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $200.00 SERVED APR-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC.
DECLARATION DEFENDANT IS CLAIMING PROOF OF SERVICE IS FALSE. FILED BY DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2025 - PLAINTIFF WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM AND PROOF OF SERVICE IS INVALED TO MAY-09-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AARON HUSAK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BUILDSOOM INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF AARON HUSAK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BUIDZOOM INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT FILED AN OBJECTION TO PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-25-2025 NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSAK, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC. $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,850.00, SEE ATTACHMENT FORM MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM INC.
